title: LocationGroup
description: A set of geographic locations (stops or areas) that can collectively serve as an origin or destination for flexible transit services.

locationGroupId.description: Unique identifier for the location group

locationGroupName.description: Human-readable name for the location group

stops.description: Stops included in this location group

gps.description: GPS coordinates as a latitude,longitude string

geojson.description: GeoJSON geometry object representing this location
